items.headline: Anthropic just gave K-12 teachers free access to Claude's premium features
items.summary: On July 14, Anthropic launched Claude for Teachers, a free one-year program giving verified US K-12 educators access to premium Claude tools, ready-made "teaching skills," and curriculum connections mapped to standards in all 50 states. Student data isn't used to train Claude, and it's covered by a K-12 privacy agreement built for federal student-privacy law.
items.why_it_matters: You don't have to be a teacher for this to be worth knowing, it's a preview of how aggressively Anthropic is giving away premium Claude access to win over entire professions, so if you have a teacher in your life (or teach a class or workshop yourself), point them to it, and keep an eye out since a similar free-access play could land in your own industry next.

categories.title: Tools & Tips for Creators and Small Biz
